task_completion.description: 16 strategic objectives are added as rounded rectangles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drawio canvas shows approximately 16 rounded rectangle shapes containing text representing the strategic objectives.

task_completion.description: Objectives are placed in the correct perspective lanes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rounded rectangles are distributed across the four lanes labeled Financial, Customer, Internal Processes, and Learning & Growth.
Shapes in the Financial lane are Gold, Customer lane are Blue, Internal Processes lane are Green, and Learning & Growth lane are Orange.
There are multiple directional arrows (approximately 17) connecting the objective shapes to show cause-and-effect relationships.

task_completion.description: The final diagram is exported as a PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or PDF viewer shows 'hospital_strategy_map.pdf' exists in the '~/Diagrams/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the drawio GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the drawio application interface open with the diagram being actively edited, rather than just terminal commands modifying an XML file.
Intermediate screenshots show partial completion of the diagram (e.g., adding shapes, then coloring, then adding arrows) rather than the final diagram appearing instantly.

integrity.description: The PDF was exported properly from the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The drawio export dialog (File -> Export as -> PDF) is visible in the trajectory, or the final PDF visually matches the created drawio canvas.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The strategy map must contain exactly 16 objectives distributed across 4 lanes: Financial (3), Customer (4), Internal Processes (5), and Learning & Growth (4). The shapes must be rounded rectangles. The colors must be: Financial = Gold (#FFD700), Customer = Blue (#4DA6FF), Internal Processes = Green (#66CC66), Learning & Growth = Orange (#FF9966). There must be exactly 17 directional arrows connecting the objectives. The final PDF must be saved to /home/ga/Diagrams/hospital_strategy_map.pdf.
